reasoning: With only about 50 days remaining in 2025 from the knowledge cutoff, the possibility of Musk leaving his CEO position is extremely low. Crucially, a massive 10-year performance-based compensation plan designed to retain him was explicitly approved by shareholders just days prior on November 6, 2025. He also publicly pledged in May 2025 to stay for at least five more years and stepped down from a brief role in the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) specifically to refocus on Tesla. Because there is no evidence of an imminent departure and strong evidence of long-term commitment, the only realistic risk of him ceasing to be CEO in the remaining weeks of 2025 would be an unforeseen health emergency, sudden death, or an abrupt massive scandal. Thus, the probability is set to the absolute lowest allowed limit.
